backend.changelog: Fix: Generate now works for Part-as-root BOMs (e.g. a Part opened directly, not as part of an assembly). Pre-1.1.15, every Generate click on a Part-as-root BOM stalled for 3 minutes then aborted with SolidWorks is still loading... and produced no output files -- the frontend's auto-open gate was hard-coded to wait for an assembly that could never appear when the BOM root was a Part. Assembly-as-root BOMs unaffected.

cadBridge.changelog: ADR-019 Stage B -- agent honors StaleItems[] (EngItem PLMIDs) and StaleDrawingPids[] sent by frontend (1.1.13+). At Generate start, before the BOM-driven OpenDoc7-per-item loop, the agent enumerates open SW docs and closes any whose GetPLMID() matches the stale set. The subsequent EngItem-OpenDoc7 path (1.8.43+) then pulls the latest rep from the platform instead of returning the stale in-memory handle. New Stale bool on PreCacheDrawingItem skips the cached-.SLDDRW SwDm short-circuit and forces OpenDoc7. Backward compatible: older frontends sending empty / null lists trigger no close-pass.
